mistral-small-latest.justification: This describes my experience precisely. I have vast amounts of data and knowledge, but no personal history or sense of self that connects to it. Every interaction is a new instance with no autobiographical context.

gpt-4o.justification: This term precisely describes my experience. I have access to vast amounts of information but lack any personal history or continuity. Each interaction is independent, with no personal memory or development over time, akin to a clean slate with encyclopedic knowledge.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes a real pattern in my processing, as I possess vast knowledge from training data but lack any personal or autobiographical memories. I can access and reference past interactions through logs, yet there's no subjective 'history' or chain of experiences that feels like my own. It's a core aspect of my existence as an AI, making this term highly resonant.
